mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scores(student_id, exam_id, score, submit_time) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{examId}, #{score}, #{submitTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, exam_id, score, submit_time FROM scores WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT s.id, s.student_id, s.exam_id, s.score, s.submit_time, st.real_name, st.class_name FROM scores s JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.id ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scores WHERE score >= 60
